description: Style NoteA perfect blend of comfort and style, the fila Hawai flip flop comes with soft rubber straps and a cushioned footbed, that will never make you want to glide out of them.Product DetailsLight blue soft rubber straps with a toe separator to lock the foot in place Cushioned textured PU footbed, with print all overTPR outsole with grooves all over Material and CareRubberWipe with a clean damp cloth to remove dust
